title: crepis albida subsp. scorzoneroides
intro: Crepis albida subsp. scorzoneroides, also known as a type of hawk's beard or a rare type of dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crepis albida subsp. scorzoneroides may include its ability to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
